exact_prompt.text: FINAL EXACT PROTOCOL REVIEW. Read-only. Repo `/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack`. Review the complete current `round_13_protocol` object whose required SHA-256 is `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`, from plan `docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json`, plus identical object in dossier, design note, corrected ADR/current-state/roadmap/P2b1 status text. Independently recompute protocol hash and assess the WHOLE protocol, not only a delta: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, retained bwrap/verified-FD confinement, deterministic repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, bootstrap vs recovery authorization, target-first S0-S4, terminal COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE precedence, observation-bounded claims, real production ZFS/no-fallback Stage2, exact 8 Stage2 paths and 3 Stage3 repo paths, frozen tuple, no current implementation/append authority. Also verify status docs now state Round6 historical milestone vs Round13 six isolated contexts from only Anthropic/OpenAI and no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai. Return verdict SIGN/REVISE/BLOCK and concise exact claims. State whether any strictly better in-scope protocol remains. Do not write.

exact_returned_output.text:
No temp files remain; the modified files listed are pre-existing working-tree state, not from this review (I wrote nothing). Final verdict below.

---

## VERDICT: **SIGN**

### Independent hash recomputation (RFC8785-JCS + SHA-256, via repo's own `extensions/_shared/jcs.ts`)
- `round_13_protocol` recomputed hash = `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76` — **matches required exactly**, and matches `round_13_protocol_hash` in both plan and dossier.
- Plan `plan_hash` = `f97b356a…e33cc` recomputed-consistent; plan file is exact JCS+LF (31978 B). Plan raw = `7dfded6e…`, dossier raw = `487c50ba…`, dossier self = `5b3052af…` — all match current-state.md.
- Dossier embeds a **byte-identical** `round_13_protocol` object (same `b53bc…` hash); dossier is exact JCS+LF and self-valid.
- Design note (`…append-design.md`) references `b53bc…` and Round6 `d10c0e…`.

### Six Round13 reviews
- All six carry `reviewed_protocol_hash = b53bc…`, are exact JCS+LF, self-valid (`review_hash`), and match plan `review_artifacts` raw/self/bytes. All **SIGN**, each recording "no strictly better in-scope solution" plus SIGN on flock-supersession, terminal-precedence, observation-bounded, and Stage2-real-ZFS-no-fallback.
- Identity honesty verified: actual reviewers = **2 providers / 6 isolated contexts (3 Anthropic + 3 OpenAI)**; legacy filenames (deepseek/minimax/moonshot/zai) explicitly *not* attestations; each review + `consensus.no_round13_participation_claimed_for` states no Round13 participation for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai.

### Whole-protocol assessment (all 15 sections, not just delta)
- **kernel_lock**: pinned `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3` on retained lock-dir OFD mapped to child fd 3, parent Node holds the same OFD (lock persists on shared OFD; release only on close/SIGKILL); status-1=BUSY→immediate no-check return; any other status/signal/anomaly=hard fail; no lock file/PID/mtime/token/stale-recovery; honestly scoped to official executors. Sound OFD-flock idiom.
- **confinement/ancestor/dirfd**: retained bwrap + verified-FD, O_DIRECTORY|O_NOFOLLOW ancestor verification, procfs dirfd-relative ops, no unverified pathname reopen, single official Node executor — TOCTOU/symlink-hard.
- **artifact_bytes**: JCS+exactly-one-LF, self-hash omits only declared field w/o LF, raw over stored bytes — exactly the rule I verified.
- **checkpoints**: bootstrap C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit/I0 exact/latest/fresh + drift_rule; recovery authorization = coordinate+bytes+prefix+continuous-chain+append-only suffix, explicitly **not** latest-user/time-fresh; whole-abrain inventory evidence-only (not a gate).
- **event_fsm**: target-first S0–S4, deterministic private temp, O_EXCL|O_NOFOLLOW, hardlink no-replace, full fsync/readback chain; frozen Round6 scanner, no shard deletion.
- **fixed_scope/frozen tuple**: fully frozen (event_id `1c8c…85a6`, envelope raw `0fe6ded…`, 1868 B), `caller_supplied_tuple_fields:[]`; matches plan `frozen_tuple`.
- **terminal precedence**: single post path carrying COMPLETE⊕target_durable_evidence_incomplete, mutually exclusive, no-overwrite, malformed/foreign→hard fail.
- **observation_boundary**: incomplete claims bounded to drift observed by a completed check; transient/between-check/post-S4/pre-SIGKILL-undurable explicitly not claimed.
- **Stage2**: exactly **8** create paths (4 `extensions/_shared/*.ts` + 3 `scripts/*.mjs` + 1 dossier), no-fallback, real production + real ZFS only, unsupported→fail with no authorization text/substitute/synthetic/handwritten/non-ZFS. **Stage3**: exactly **3** repo outputs (ratification/intent/post). Path sets identical across acceptance/policy/validation/authorization-stage.
- **reversal/threat_boundary**: durable delete/rewrite/replace forbidden; retraction=authorized lifecycle append; advisory flock honestly not claimed to exclude foreign writers; foreign bytes fail-closed.

### Current-state invariants (all confirmed)
- All 8 Stage2 and all 3 Stage3 paths **absent**; event target + second-level shard `1c/8c` **absent** (first-level `1c` exists, as declared `existing_directory`).
- All 15 authorized design/status paths **exist**; non-authority flags all `false`; status `accepted_round13_design_implementation_and_append_not_authorized`.
- ADR 0040, current-state.md, roadmap.md, and P2b1 note all state: Round6 = historical six-vendor milestone; Round13 supersedes Round6 PID/mtime/token lock + terminal semantics, accepted by six isolated contexts from two actual providers (3 Anthropic + 3 OpenAI); no Round13 participation claimed for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai; implementation + append unauthorized. transition-register.md/machine.json reference the append as design-only/blocked.

### Strictly better in-scope protocol?
**None remains.** For the stated constraints (design-only, append-only single fixed event, advisory-flock coordination, bwrap confinement, idempotent target-first FSM on real ZFS), the design sits at a local optimum: replacing the Round6 bespoke PID/mtime/token lock with an OFD-flock eliminates an entire stale/dead-owner/token failure class; no-replace hardlink + single terminal path + observation-bounded claims are minimal and sound. Conceivable alternatives (`renameat2 RENAME_NOREPLACE`, `O_TMPFILE`+`linkat`) are lateral, ZFS-support-dependent, and would reintroduce portability risk versus the already-proven link+fsync chain — not strictly better. This matches the unanimous recorded consensus.

No write performed; review is read-only.
